headline: Sector Update: Financial Stocks Advance Friday Afternoon

headline: KKR (KKR) Stock After 28% Slide Is The Current Price An Opportunity
summary: If you are wondering whether KKR at around US$92.65 is starting to look attractively priced or still demanding, the starting point is to understand what the current market value actually reflects. The stock has fallen about 4.5% over the past week and is down 2.5% over the past month, which sits against a much steeper year to date decline of 28.1% and a 29.3% decline over the past year, even though the 3 year and 5 year returns of 69.1% and 61.8% tell a very different story. Recent headlines...
